events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need evaluate sequence check: pressure testing industrial site, observed pneumatic test without exclusion zone, in-progress. Need determine decision fail because dangerous/non-compliant. Need risk high/critical? Pneumatic testing without exclusion zone is critical hazard due to stored energy, potential rupture, flying debris. ASME B31.3 §345 requires precautions for pneumatic testing, including establishment of exclusion zones, personnel removed, etc. Need component_conditions installed-defective? The scenario says categories may apply: installed-defective. But condition is pneumatic test without exclusion zone; component may not be defective, but the installation/test setup is non-compliant. The allowed component_conditions list includes installed-defective, non-compliant, worn, degraded, failed. We can include "non-compliant". Maybe "installed-defective" not necessarily. Use non-compliant. percent_complete maybe 60? value not asked, 0. sound_source etc default empty? Schema says string for sound_source, numbers. Use empty string and 0. order maybe sequence IDs? Not provided. Could leave empty list. workable empty. findings: pneumatic test being conducted without an exclusion zone; personnel at risk from stored energy release; violation of ASME B31.3 §345 test safety requirements. actions: immediately stop pneumatic test; establish and barricade exclusion zone; evacuate non-essential personnel; post qualified watch/spotters; verify test procedure and permit; inspect equipment; resume only after safety plan approved. rationale. references: ASME B31.3 §345. Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "critical",
  "work_stage": "in-progress",
  "component_conditions": ["non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 60,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Pneumatic test is in progress without an established exclusion zone.",
    "Personnel are exposed to high stored-energy hazard in the event of a rupture or fitting failure.",
    "Test setup does not meet ASME B31.3 §345 safety precautions for pneumatic testing."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately stop the pneumatic test.",
    "Establish a clearly marked, barricaded exclusion zone sized to the test pressure and piping volume.",
    "Evacuate all non-essential personnel from the exclusion zone.",
    "Post a qualified watch/spotter to control access during the test.",
    "Review and approve the test procedure, permit, and safety plan before resuming.",
    "Re-inspect test equipment and re-validate safeguards prior to restart."
  ],
  "rationale": "ASME B31.3 §345 requires special precautions for pneumatic testing because compressed gas stores large amounts of energy. Conducting a pneumatic test without an exclusion zone creates an imminent danger of serious injury or fatality if the piping or a component fails, so the work must be stopped until the required safety zone and controls are in place.",
  "references": ["ASME B31.3 §345"]
}
